Quote: ὅσα  &  φυσικῶς ὡς τὰ ἄλογα ζῷα ἐπίστανται
Note: This clause refers to the sexual immorality of the false teachers, who thoughtlessly live according to their natural sexual desires, the way animals do. If it would be helpful in your language, you could express this simile by translating the simile plainly. Alternate translation: “what they naturally understand, unrestrained sexual desires”
